repo_signals: L3 smoke for hardware.fpga-toolflow: synthesis to place-and-route to STA, XDC and SDC constraints, clock definitions, false and multicycle paths, floorplanning, bitstream, incremental compile
write unit tests for a Python data parsing function

retrieval_query: vivado quartus synthesis place and route static timing analysis xdc sdc constraint clock definition false path multicycle path floorplan bitstream incremental compile

validation_smoke.name: hardware.fpga-toolflow L3 validation smoke
signals: static timing analysis reports positive setup and hold slack across all clock domains
every clock and generated clock is explicitly defined in the constraint file before optimization
asynchronous clock crossings are declared and covered by synchronizers rather than left unconstrained
the generated bitstream programs the device and the design meets timing at the target frequency on hardware

diagnosis_smoke.name: hardware.fpga-toolflow diagnosis smoke
signals: negative setup slack on a long combinational path points to logic that needs pipelining or a relaxed clock
hold violations on short paths suggest missing clock skew constraints or a too-aggressive clock
a path reported as failing that is actually multicycle indicates a missing timing exception
a clock shown as unconstrained in the timing summary means a create_clock statement is missing
wildly optimistic slack that fails on hardware hints at an over-broad false-path exception hiding a real path
